description: You are a robotics engineer preparing a standardized benchmark arena for testing Autonomous Mobile Robot (AMR) path planning algorithms. Edit the Webots world to include four cylindrical obstacle pillars (radius 0.15, height 0.5) named PILLAR_1, PILLAR_2, PILLAR_3, and PILLAR_4 at translations (1.0, 0, 1.0), (-1.0, 0, 1.0), (1.0, 0, -1.0), and (-1.0, 0, -1.0) respectively, ensuring each has a Physics node and boundingObject. Configure the robot's lidar sensor with 4 layers, a maxRange of 5.0, a fieldOfView of 3.14159, and a horizontalResolution of 360. Set the WorldInfo title to "Navigation Benchmark Arena v1" and the robot's controller to "void". Save the finalized world to /home/ga/Desktop/navigation_benchmark.wbt.
